component.name: wf-recorder-gui
component.summary: GTK3 GUI and TUI for wf-recorder on wlroots compositors

description.p: A clean, theme-respecting frontend for wf-recorder. Provides a GTK3 GUI, a ratatui-based TUI, a system tray icon, and xdg-desktop-portal integration.

ul.li: GTK3 GUI without CSD (respects the WM's title bar)
Terminal UI with the same feature set
System tray icon with idle/recording/error states
Preset system with three resource tiers (low / medium / high-end)
Video formats: MP4 (H.264), WebM (VP9), MKV (H.264), GIF
Audio formats: AAC, MP3, Vorbis (OGG), Opus
FPS changer (15-144), CRF quality slider, per-stream bitrate
X11 / non-wlroots detection with a clear warning
